content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

I did not find runtime correctness bugs in the changed lines because the patch contains no functional code changes; the critical gap is that the requested lifecycle implementation is not present in this diff.

## Amendments

1. `git diff` for this revision only touches `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson` (around lines 237–243) and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json` (around lines 12–29). No source files under `src/` are modified, so required runtime changes for PID lifecycle tracking (`src/adapters/fs.rs`), `run stop`/stale handling (`src/cli/run.rs`), and resume recovery/signal-safe interruption (`src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`) are not implemented in this patch.
   Rationale: The working-tree change set is metadata-only and cannot satisfy the requested acceptance criteria for run lifecycle robustness.
